name: CLOSER-Bench: Evaluating Budgeted Cross-Stage Design Closure for Hardware Agents

description: arXiv:2607.16632v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Hardware engineering exposes coding agents to a form of long-horizon work that is difficult to capture with pass-at-k: progress is continuous, tool feedback is delayed and heterogeneous, and a backend failure may require revising RTL rather than tuning another physical-design parameter.
